title: Looking for Teacher at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal University Consulting Pvt Ltd!
